title: Cryptool reaches Next Block Expo Pitch Contest top-10
content_html:
Cryptool has been selected as one of ten finalists for the Next Block Expo Pitch Contest, held in Warsaw on 19 and 20 March 2025.

The competition gathers some of the most active early-stage Web3 projects in Europe, with prizes of up to 225,000 EUR for the top three teams. Being in the final ten puts Cryptool in front of a strong investor and partner audience, and the team will be on the ground in Warsaw for the full event.

If you are attending NBX and want to meet the team, message CEO Ron directly to set something up.
author: Cryptool
